productDisplayName: Nike Men White Ballista Sports Shoes
description: Style NoteThe nike Ballista II is a great running shoe with mesh and synthetic uppers for a comfortable yet breathable feel. The high resolution Impact Groove configuration on the sole of this shoe is it's USP - it provides a naturally efficient stride and flexibility for the wearer. Product DetailsRound toed sport shoe with mesh upper and synthetic overlays and central lace-upsA padded tongue and inner (mesh padding)A cushioned footbed and a foamy midsoleTPU outsole with a decoupled heel and waffle patterned lugs on the forefoot and back footMaterial and CareSynthetic, meshWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
